title: 公式が最大手すぐる件

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Uhhh, Trainer. There's something I'd like to talk
to you about real quick...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital stops me while I'm walking down
the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't happen to know a good way to
swap out Tachyon's socks without her knowing,
would you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right. Well, when I passed her in the hallway
earlier, I noticed her knee-highs were sagging just
a smidge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My guess is the elastic is starting to go. I must
have missed it when I was folding and putting
away the laundry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not what you're thinking! It's just Tachyon
never puts away her clean clothes, and I don't
want them to get mixed up with her dirty ones!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But look at what my sloppy work has done. It
must be annoying for her having her knee-highs
constantly sagging.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to swap them out! And in order
to protect her honor, I wanna prevent her from
knowing anything!

Bravo! What a perfectly wonderful display of
friendship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital! The sight of you anguishing over the
threat to your friend's good name tugs at my
heartstrings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You've inspired me to impart a technique to you
that can be used to keep your torch of friendship
aflame.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-seriously?! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, you must choose! Will you go on the
offensive and boldy swap the socks by force, or
would you prefer the elegance of a more delicate
method?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll take either method with open arms!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In that case, perhaps your trainer can choose in
your stead.
choice_data_list: Let's seize them in a show of force!
Smart and elegant, if you please.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let us paint your friendship in the
fierce shades of battle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You called for me. What is it you need?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmph... You can help with this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is Opera O offering her the socks?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon! I challenge thee!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaagh! No, it's a challenge! Things are getting seriously moe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A duel between Opera O and Tachyon! Fwoojhh!
This is the stuff of every otaku's dreams!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who wouldn't want to see two polar opposites
paired together? The arts against the sciences!
Talk about prime shipping material!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... To put it another way, it's like a duel
between a knight commander and an arch wizard!
Nyghk! It's moe to the very last drop!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And this is?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The alternative for a dueling glove! Because I wish
not to put a strain our relationship, I will refrain
from slapping you with it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You'll find a pair of socks inside. We've wrapped
them in an effort to make them less
conspicuous—a token of your friend's
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You challenged me to a duel for the purpose of
giving me a pair of socks?! Ahahaha! That
concept of yours—skill enhancement through
pure auto-suggestion—I find it fascinating!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But examining you would take a great amount of
time that I simply do not have. There are more
pressing experiments I must attend to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As for the socks... I've already gone half a day
wearing this pair, so it shouldn't be too much
trouble to finish the rest with them. Now, if you'll
excuse me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I say! What a marvelous opponent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How casually she insinuates to Digital that
concern is not needed... and with such kindness!
The spirit of friendship between them stirs my
heart!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And yet... Digital. Why the long face?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The duel... Ghhh... I wanted to see you duel!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! I see! Despondent over the missed
opportunity to gaze upon my heroic visage, eh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll be sure to invite you to my next performance of Haoengrin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwoagh! That sounds bliss inducing! I'll need to
bring a whole bath towel to soak up my tears!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the "moe" situation Agnes Digital
encountered has fully washed away her worries.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let us color your friendship with
elegance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, my fair lady. Might I trouble you for a
moment? You see, my friend here and I are
looking for someone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We're trying to find the owner of this item here.
Digital, if you would be so kind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! We're trying to find an Umamusume
whose legs fit these socks perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if we tried them on your lovely
calves, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I don't mind being a subject in your test.
Go ahead and put them on me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...You want me to do it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're the one running this experiment, no? You
must operate with your own hands if you're to
ensure your results are accurate!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
True, the burden is not Tachyon's to bear. Prove
your mettle, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Go right ahead. Although, it'll probably be easier
if you come a bit closer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-th-th-th...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is beyond my wildest dreeeams! It's too much
moe to handle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital flees the scene with an expression
torn between joy and tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It appears that's the limit to how close
she can get to me. Next, I'll need to conduct a
thorough analysis of her mental state.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It appears the one truly being
experimented on was Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, and I'll go ahead and take this. Now that I
think of it, these socks I have on today might be a
bit loose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand over the new socks to Agnes Tachyon.
With that accomplished, I go looking for Agnes
Digital to report on our success.
